Wonder Woman (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $412,563,408Details
International Box Office $410,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $822,963,408
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $25,989,028
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $72,919,172
Total $98,908,200
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Before she was Wonder Woman, she was Diana, princess of the Amazons, trained to be an unconquerable warrior. Raised on a sheltered island paradise, when an American pilot crashes on their shores and tells of a massive conflict raging in the outside world, Diana leaves her home, convinced she can stop the threat. Fighting alongside man in a war to end all wars, Diana will discover her full powers… and her true destiny.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$103,251,471 (25.0% of total gross)
Legs:4.00 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,165 opening theaters/4,165 max. theaters, 9.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $550,084,544

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 2nd, 2017 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 29th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 30th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
May 30th, 2017 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
May 31st, 2017 (Wide) (China)
June 1st, 2017 (Wide) (Italy)
Video Release: August 29th, 2017 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, and some suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2468 (Cert #50984), 3/22/2017)
Running Time: 141 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe, Wonder Woman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Character Appearance: Wonder Woman
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): London, England, Matera, Italy, Paris, France
Filming location (country): England, France, Italy, United Kingdom
Filming location (locale): Arundel Castle, West Sussex, England, Australia House, London, England, Bourne Wood, Surrey, England, British Museum, London, England, Camerota, Italy, Castel del Monte, Italy, Cilentan Coast, Italy, Hatfield House, Hertfordshire, England, Kings Cross Station, London, England, Lincoln’s Inn Fields, London, England, Louvre Museum, Paris, France, Lower Halstow, Kent, England, One Great George Street, London, England, Sassi di Matera, Italy, Sicilian Avenue, London, England, Tilbury Docks, Essex, England, Tilbury Fort, Essex, England, Trafalgar Square, London, England, Upper Heyford air base, Oxfordshire, England, Victoria House, London, England, Villa Cimbrone, Italy
Filming location (production facility): Leavesden Studios, Hertfordshire, England
Filming location (state or county): Essex, England, Hertfordshire, England, Kent, England, Oxfordshire, England, Surrey, England, West Sussex, England
Plot point: Gods and Goddesses, Marooned, Non-Chronological, Origin Story, Secret Agent, War
Social setting: Greek Mythology, World War I
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1910s
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Atlas Entertainment, Cruel and Unusual Films, RatPac Entertainment, Dune Entertainment, Tencent Pictures , Wanda Pictures, DC Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Before she was Wonder Woman, she was Diana, princess of the Amazons, trained to be an unconquerable warrior. Raised on a sheltered island paradise, when an American pilot crashes on their shores and tells of a massive conflict raging in the outside world, Diana leaves her home, convinced she can stop the threat. Fighting alongside man in a war to end all wars, Diana will discover her full powers… and her true destiny.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$103,251,471 (25.0% of total gross)
Legs:4.00 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,165 opening theaters/4,165 max. theaters, 9.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $550,084,544

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 2nd, 2017 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 29th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 30th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
May 30th, 2017 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
May 31st, 2017 (Wide) (China)
June 1st, 2017 (Wide) (Italy)
Video Release: August 29th, 2017 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, and some suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2468 (Cert #50984), 3/22/2017)
Running Time: 141 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe, Wonder Woman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Character Appearance: Wonder Woman
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR

Filming location (production facility): Leavesden Studios, Hertfordshire, England
Filming location (state or county): Essex, England, Hertfordshire, England, Kent, England, Oxfordshire, England, Surrey, England, West Sussex, England

Social setting: Greek Mythology, World War I
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1910s

Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
